variants: In the enchanting surroundings of Everbrook Hollow, Jamila Roquette pursues her passion for cartography as an active member of the Xanadu Mapmakers. Originally from Solstice Gate, she has made her mark on the mapping community through her groundbreaking book, the Hazelvine Compression Table, which presents novel techniques for managing spatial data. Her remarkable contributions to the field have not gone unrecognized, as she was honored with the Grand Aster Crest for her outstanding work. Now, living in Everbrook Hollow, Jamila's dedication to innovation continues to flourish, bridging her artistic journey from her birthplace.
